items.title: Meet the Agent Academy Hackathon Winners
items.titleOriginal: Meet the Agent Academy Hackathon Winners
items.summary: From May 12 to June 2, 2026, builders from around the world put their Agent Academy learning to the test by designing, building, and shipping real, working AI agents with Copilot Studio. After two weeks of judging, we’re thrilled to announce the Agent Academy Hackathon winners. 🏆 The Winners Recruit...

items.title: Power Fx: User Defined Types Generally Available
items.titleOriginal: Power Fx: User Defined Types Generally Available
items.summary: User Defined Types (UDTs) are now generally available! As of Power Apps Studio version 3.26044, UDTs are enabled by default for new apps and can be enabled for existing apps under Settings > Updates > New > User-Defined types.
items.summaryOriginal: User Defined Types (UDTs) are now generally available! As of Power Apps Studio version 3.26044, UDTs are enabled by default for new apps and can be enabled for existing apps under Settings > Updates > New > User-Defined types.

items.title: Power Apps MCP server introduces closed-loop learning for enterprise agents
items.titleOriginal: Power Apps MCP server introduces closed-loop learning for enterprise agents
items.summary: Building agents is fast. Teaching them how your organization works has been the hard part. Introducing closed-loop learning on the Power Apps MCP server: every correction calibrates the agent to your business, automatically.
items.summaryOriginal: Building agents is fast. Teaching them how your organization works has been the hard part. Introducing closed-loop learning on the Power Apps MCP server: every correction calibrates the agent to your business, automatically.

items.title: Custom tools and rich UI for app-based conversations are now in Public Preview
items.titleOriginal: Custom tools and rich UI for app-based conversations are now in Public Preview
items.summary: Discover how custom tools and rich, app‑powered UI experiences can elevate business app conversations in Microsoft 365 Copilot. This public preview introduces new ways to surface app intelligence, drive action, and deliver more contextual, intuitive interactions - directly within the flow of work.

items.title: Power Platform Monitor Alerts Are Now Generally Available
items.titleOriginal: Power Platform Monitor Alerts Are Now Generally Available
items.summary: We are excited to announce that Power Platform Monitor alerts for apps, agents, and flows are now generally available! Monitor alerts meet the reliability and maturity standards required for general availability, following sustained investments to improve quality.

items.title: Agent Academy Spring Drop: Special Ops, Cowork Collective, and a Whole New Look
items.titleOriginal: Agent Academy Spring Drop: Special Ops, Cowork Collective, and a Whole New Look
items.summary: We’ve shipped a big round of updates to Agent Academy. Two new sections, a completely redone site experience, and more missions on the way. Here’s what’s changed. Quick recap for anyone new Agent Academy is a free, open-source curriculum for learning how to build agents with Microsoft Copilot Studio...

items.title: Public Preview: Your business apps, now part of every conversation
items.titleOriginal: Public Preview: Your business apps, now part of every conversation
items.summary: Bring your Power Apps into Microsoft 365 Copilot. In public preview, makers can enable conversational access to model-driven app data with Grids and Forms, with Custom Tools coming soon.

items.titleOriginal: What’s new in Power Platform: March 2026 feature update
